description: city in and county seat of Lamar County, Texas, United States
description_wiki: Paris is a city in and the county seat of Lamar County, Texas, United States.

description: American League franchise in Washington, D.C., 1901 to 1960
description_wiki: The Washington Senators were a Major League Baseball team based in Washington, D.C. It was one of the American League's eight charter franchises, founded in 1901.

description: Major League Baseball franchise in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania
description_wiki: The Philadelphia Phillies are an American professional baseball team based in Philadelphia.

description: baseball team and Major League Baseball franchise in the Bronx, New York, United States
description_wiki: The New York Yankees are an American professional baseball team based in the New York City borough of the Bronx.

description: maritime branch of the United States military
description_wiki: The United States Navy (USN) is the maritime service branch of the United States Armed Forces and is designated as the navy of the United States in the Constitution.

description: seat of San Diego County, California, United States; second-largest city in California
description_wiki: San Diego (  SAN dee-AY-goh; Spanish: [san ˈdjeɣo]) is a city on the Pacific coast of Southern California, adjacent to the Mexico–United States border.

description: city in Los Angeles County, California, United States
description_wiki: Long Beach is a coastal city in southeastern Los Angeles County, California, United States.

description: harbor on the island of Oahu, Hawaii, USA
description_wiki: Pearl Harbor is a lagoon harbor on the island of Oʻahu, Hawaii, United States, west of Honolulu.

description: archipelagic country in Southeast Asia
description_wiki: The Philippines, officially the Republic of the Philippines, is an archipelagic country in Southeast Asia.

description: province of the Philippines
description_wiki: Cebu ( seb-OO; Cebuano: Sugbo), officially the Province of Cebu (Cebuano: Lalawigan sa Sugbo; Filipino: Lalawigan ng Cebu), is a province of the Philippines located in the Central Visayas (Region VII) region, and consists of a main island and 167 surrounding islands and islets.

description: 1941 Japanese surprise attack on the U.S
description_wiki: On December 7, 1941, the Empire of Japan launched a surprise military strike on the United States Pacific Fleet at its naval base at Pearl Harbor on Oahu, Hawaii.

description: 1914 Nevada-class battleship
description_wiki: USS Oklahoma (BB-37) was a Nevada-class battleship built by the New York Shipbuilding Corporation for the United States Navy, notable for being the first American class of oil-burning dreadnoughts.

description: warship type designed for escort duties against smaller vessels
description_wiki:
In naval terminology, a destroyer is a fast, maneuverable, long-endurance warship intended to escort
larger vessels in a fleet, convoy, or carrier battle group and defend them against a wide range of general threats.

description: type of large warship
description_wiki: A cruiser is a type of warship.

description: 1915 Pennsylvania-class battleship
capital city of New South Wales, Australia
description_wiki: Sydney is the capital city of the state of New South Wales, and is the most populous city in Australia.

description: suburb of Perth, Western Australia
description_wiki: Melville is a suburb of Perth, Western Australia located within the likewise named City of Melville.

description: 1922 unique aircraft carrier of the United States Navy
description_wiki: USS Langley (CV-1/AV-3) was the United States Navy's first aircraft carrier, converted in 1920 from the collier USS Jupiter (Navy Fleet Collier No.

description: 1938 fighter aircraft family
description_wiki: The Curtiss P-40 Warhawk is an American single-engined, single-seat, all-metal fighter-bomber that first flew in 1938.

description: 1929 Northampton-class cruiser
description_wiki: USS Houston (CL/CA-30), was a Northampton-class cruiser of the United States Navy.

description: shallow sea between Java and Borneo, in Indonesia
description_wiki: The Java Sea (Indonesian: Laut Jawa, Javanese: Segara Jawa) is an extensive shallow sea in Indonesia.

description: largest city in Pennsylvania, United States
description_wiki: Philadelphia (  FIL-ə-DEL-fee-ə), colloquially referred to as Philly, is the most populous city in the U.S. state of Pennsylvania, and the sixth-most populous city in the United States, with a Census-estimated population of 1,574,281 in July 2025.

description: American politician, U.S. Secretary of State from 1933 to 1944
description_wiki: Cordell Hull (October 2, 1871 – July 23, 1955) was an American politician and diplomat who served as the United States secretary of state for nearly twelve years under President Franklin D. Roosevelt, from 1933 to 1944.

description: numbered fleet of the United States Navy
description_wiki: The Seventh Fleet is a numbered fleet of the United States Navy.

description: United States Navy fleet admiral (1885–1966)
description_wiki: Chester William Nimitz (; 24 February 1885 – 20 February 1966) was a fleet admiral in the United States Navy.

description: United States Army general in WWI, WWII and Korea (1880–1964)
description_wiki: Douglas MacArthur (26 January 1880 – 5 April 1964) was an American general who served as a top commander during World War II and the Korean War, achieving the rank of General of the Army.

description: naval warfare branch of the Australian Defence Force
description_wiki: The Royal Australian Navy (RAN) is the naval branch of the Australian Defence Force (ADF).

description: 1927 Kent-class heavy cruiser
description_wiki: HMAS Australia (I84/D84/C01) was a County-class heavy cruiser of the Royal Australian Navy (RAN).

description: Wikimedia disambiguation page
description_wiki: Cape Gloucester may refer to:

description: island in the Pacific Ocean
description_wiki: New Guinea (Tok Pisin: Niugini; Hiri Motu: Niu Gini; Indonesian: Papua, fossilized Nugini, also known as Papua or historically Irian) is the world's second-largest island, with an area of 785,753 km2 (303,381 sq mi).

description: species of bird
description_wiki: The emu (; Dromaius novaehollandiae) is a species of flightless bird endemic to Australia, where it is the tallest native bird.

description: human settlement in Papua New Guinea
description_wiki: Madang (old German name: Friedrich-Wilhelmshafen) is the capital of Madang Province and is a town with a population of 27,420 (in 2005) on the north coast of Papua New Guinea.

description: island in Papua New Guinea
description_wiki: Los Negros Island is the third largest of the Admiralty Islands.

description: harbor on Admiralty Islands
description_wiki: Seeadler Harbor, also known as Port Seeadler, is located on Manus Island, Admiralty Islands, Papua New Guinea and played an important role in World War II. In German, "Seeadler" means sea eagle, pointing to German colonial activity between 1884 and 1919 in that area.

description: Wikimedia disambiguation page
description_wiki: Hollandia may refer to:

description: island in Biak Numfor Regency, Papua Province, Indonesia
description_wiki: Biak is the main island of Biak Archipelago located in Cenderawasih Bay near the northern coast of Papua, an Indonesian province, and is just northwest of New Guinea.

description: 1944 naval battle
gulf located east of the island of Leyte in the Philippines
description_wiki: Leyte Gulf, also known simply as the Leyte, is a gulf in the Eastern Visayan region in the Philippines.

description: sovereign island country and city-state in maritime Southeast Asia
description_wiki: Singapore, officially the Republic of Singapore, is an island country and city-state in Southeast Asia.

aliases: Second Battle of the Philippine Sea
description: 1944 the largest naval battle of World War II
description_wiki: The Battle of Leyte Gulf (23–26 October 1944) was the largest naval battle of World War II and by some criteria the largest naval battle in history, with over 200,000 naval personnel involved.

description: island in the Philippines
description_wiki: Corregidor (Tagalog: [ko.ɾɛ.hɪˈdoɾ], Spanish: [ko.re.xiˈðoɾ], Tagalog: Pulo ng Corregidor, Spanish: Isla del Corregidor) is an island located at the entrance of Manila Bay in the southwestern part of Luzon in the Philippines, and is considered part of Cavite City and thus the province of Cavite.

aliases: Queen City of the Pacific and others
description: capital city of the Philippines
description_wiki: Manila, officially the City of Manila, is the capital and second-most populous city of the Philippines after Quezon City.

description: island in San Francisco, California
description_wiki: Treasure Island is a man-made island in San Francisco Bay, and a neighborhood in the City and County of San Francisco.

description: 1936 Porpoise-class submarine
description_wiki: USS Perch (SS-176), a Porpoise-class submarine, was the first ship of the United States Navy to be named for the perch.
